summary: The user recently watched "Parasite" and sought recommendations for films that explore social class issues, leading to a discussion about various movies. They decided to include "Shoplifters" and "The Death of Mr. Lazarescu" in their upcoming movie marathon, along with action films like "No Time to Die" and "Mission: Impossible - Fallout" to balance the lineup.
facts: The user watched "Parasite" for the first time on an unspecified date and is planning a movie marathon with friends. The user decided to include "Shoplifters" (2018) in the marathon, which explores the struggles of the working class. The user is also considering including "The Death of Mr. Lazarescu" (2005) for its themes of social class and bureaucracy. The user plans to include "No Time to Die" (2020) in the marathon for its action-packed sequences. The user has always loved the "Mission: Impossible" series and considers "Mission: Impossible - Fallout" (2018) one of the best action movies in recent years. The user mentioned that Henry Cavill's mustache in "Mission: Impossible - Fallout" is iconic. The user is creating a movie marathon lineup that includes "Parasite," "Shoplifters," "The Death of Mr. Lazarescu," "No Time to Die," and "Mission: Impossible - Fallout."
